title: Home - MRADC
description: M R Ambedkar Dental College and Hospital Comprehensive Dental Clinic(A Unique Skill-Based Student Education) Academics Research Center Alumni Club OUR INSTITUTION We offer specialized education and training in the field of dentistry. It is a higher education institution where students pursue a dental degree and gain the necessary knowledge and skills to become dentists. Our College provides comprehensive dental programs that combine academic coursework with clinical training. The programs cover various aspects of dentistry and opportunities for research, community outreach programs, and dental health campaigns. study @ MRADCH Graduate, Post Graduate, Fellowship and PHD programs + Years of Academic Excellence 0 + Faculty and Academicians 0 + CDE programs in three years 0 + Publications and ongoing Research Work 0 + Alumni Members 0 + Student Achievements Cultural Activities & Sports AI Research Student Council Activity Staff Achievements CDE Program Certification Courses NSS Activity VISION To train a community of competent, duty conscious and dedicated Clinicians, Academicians and Researchers. To restore and maintain the oral health, there by improving the health related quality of life of the people. MISSION To establish high standards in oral health science education in the country. To impart learner centred oral health education. To inculcate human values and a sense of service among the students. To create a high-end research and development atmosphere promoting scholarly activities that benefit the profession and public. To take oral health care to the door steps of the under privileged. OUR DEPARTMENTS Oral Medicine & Radiology Periodontics Conservative Dentistry & Endodontics Prosthodontics & Maxillofacial Prosthetics Public Health Dentistry Oral & Maxillofacial Surgery Paedodontics and Preventive Orthodontics & Dento Facial Orthopedics Oral Maxillofacial pathology & Microbiology happenings @MRADCH Lorem ipsum dolo Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit.
